heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 1, 1956, ch. 80770 Stat. 774
label: 183 Repealed. ,Aug. 1, 1956, ch. 80770 Stat. 774
notes: Section, R.S. § 4126, related to the extension of other laws to Persia and suits between American citizens and subjects of Persia and other countries.

Effective Date of RepealAct , repealed section 183 effective upon the date which the President determined to be appropriate for the relinquishment of jurisdiction of the United States in Morocco. Jurisdiction of the United States in Morocco was relinquished by memorandum of President Eisenhower dated . Notice was given to Morocco on , and all pending cases were disposed of by 1960. See Bulletin of the State Department Vol. 35:909, page 844.Aug. 1, 1956Sept. 15, 1956Oct. 6, 1956
